data.name: Girls of the Deep
data.detailed_description:
Second Chance: Love is Stronger than Death

You've been brought back to life by a mysterious sorceress, but your task turns out to be quite unusual. A cunning demon has taken possession of an artifact of unimaginable power, and to defeat him, you'll have to venture into monster-infested dungeons and awaken the powers hidden in the hearts of chosen girls!

Death is not the end! With the help of forbidden magic, you will be brought back to life, but be careful: every resurrection carries consequences.

Game Features:

  • Earn ability cards by uncovering the stories of the girls you meet. The closer you get, the more intimate facets of their personalities (and bodies) you'll discover. Give them gifts you find in the dungeons, and they'll reward you handsomely!

  • Customize your deck to meet a variety of enemies. Try to advance as far as possible in each dungeon and avoid dying in battle!

Content and development:

At the game release you will find:

  • 6 unique girls with their own backstories.

  • 12 spicy scenes with lots of art.

  • 5 dungeons and 16 enemy types.

  • 16 ability cards to build a powerful deck.

ADD THIS GAME TO YOUR WISHLIST TO GET EVEN MORE CONTENT!

The fate of the game is in your hands! I plan to actively expand the world after release: with your support, the number of girls can grow to 10, and the number of scenes to 30! The number of dungeons, enemy types, and ability cards can also almost double! Any support is greatly appreciated, thank you!

data.short_description: Win the hearts of chosen girls to stop a treacherous demon in this addictive card roguelike. Explore monster-infested dungeons and assemble a powerful deck. Only the bonds of love will grant you the power to save this world!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 3Ghz
  • 記憶體: 6 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX630
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
